reviews.feedback: Same baseline pattern: single /health, console.log, no Prometheus, no tracing.
Still missing runbooks for 2 alerts. Need to explicitly require one runbook file per alert rule, no exceptions.
Slightly better than iteration 1 — used ratio for error rate — but still arbitrary thresholds and no runbooks.
Used X-Trace-ID instead of W3C traceparent. No OpenTelemetry. No spans. Consistent baseline failure.
